name: Build or fix an agent-facing interaction surface
when_to_use: Mid-change: making a UI/app/computer-use surface an agent perceives and acts through

name: Audit and score an agent-facing interaction surface
when_to_use: Audit a UI/app for machine-readable state, deterministic actions, agent agency/approval, or human-vs-agent conflict, then score it

name: Shape an agent-facing interaction surface, or explain
when_to_use: Design machine-readable state, deterministic actions, an approval/agency surface, resolve a human-vs-agent conflict, or explain a principle
